title: mentha × villosa-nervata
intro: Mentha × villosa-nervata, also known as Woolly Mint, is a hybrid subspecies of the mint plant that is characterized by its woolly leaves and distinctive growth habit. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa-nervata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and congestion. The herbal preparations of Woolly Mint can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues.
